series_metadata.series_description: The ODNR Office of Coastal Management maintains files related to determinations of Federal Consistency with the Ohio Coastal Management Program (OCMP) enforceable policies. These files may contain copies of project summaries, Consistency Certifications signed by federal permit applicants, Federal Consistency Determinations prepared by federal agencies, State of Ohio regulatory applications, state/federal agency correspondence, public notices, environmental reviews, other correspondence, and other documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Ten (10) years ; Paper: One (1) year final consistency determination or inactivity of application, or replaced with electronic version
